caption: This Travel Hack Will Help You Land Free Flights EVEN In Business and First Class And 90 % Of People Don’t Even Know About It! Watch Until The End So You Can Take Full Advantage Of This Travel Hack! #travelhacks #creditcardpoints #pointsandmiles #creditcardpointsandmiles #freetravel

transcription.text: This travel hack will help you land free flights even in business and first class and most people don't even know about it. By the way, I'm Christina and I teach you how to travel in luxury almost free. So this travel hack is actually a tool called Point.me. It helps you get 6 to 12 times the value on your credit card points. One of the biggest mistakes people make with their credit card points is that they book their flights through their travel portal. But the best thing to do is to transfer your points to partner airlines and Point.me is this incredible search tool that makes everything easier when you're trying to figure out which partner airlines you should transfer your points to. So instead of checking 10 different airline websites, it searches across programs like Amex, Chase, Capital One Transfer Partners, and shows you which airline to book, how many points you need, what transfer partners to use, and step-by-step how to book it. So instead of spending 1.4 million points for a first class ticket to Tokyo, with Point.me you could redeem 120,000 points for the same flight. Share this with your travel buddy and follow this series to learn about the travel hacks no one teaches you.
